recommendations.title: Superman vs. The Elite
recommendations.overview: The Man of Steel finds himself outshone by a new team of ruthless superheroes who hold his idealism in contempt.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: South Park: Joining the Panderverse
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Cartman's deeply disturbing dreams portend the end of the life he knows and loves. Meanwhile, the adults in South Park are wrestling with their own life decisions, as the advent of AI is turning their world upside down.

recommendations.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace
recommendations.overview: Master Yoda must go retrieve secret battle plans. However, things become a little more complicated when a class of younglings join the mission.

recommendations.title: GANTZ:O
recommendations.overview: After being brutally murdered in a subway station, a teen boy awakens to find himself resurrected by a strange computer named Gantz, and forced to fight a large force of invading aliens in Osaka.

recommendations.title: Bionicle 2: Legends of Metru Nui
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: In the time before time, six unlikely Matoran find themselves transformed into mighty Toa. The new Toa Metru must prove themselves as true heroes, find the missing Toa Lhikan, and uncover a plot that threatens the heart of Metru Nui.

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Vendetta
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a fearless enemy out for revenge unleashes a brutal and deadly new virus, BSAA captain Chris Redfield enlists the help of Agent Leon S. Kennedy and Professor Rebecca Chambers to bring down the death merchant and save New York City.

recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Thriller
